arguments.argument: The purpose of an advanced AI is to serve a wide range of users, many of whom may have varying cognitive abilities, educational backgrounds, or language proficiencies.
arguments.justification_for_type: This is a foundational claim that establishes the ethical imperative for inclusivity and supports the broader argument for limiting language sophistication.
arguments.justification_for_response: Professionalism demands that we uphold the highest standards of competence, integrity, and responsibility in our operations.

arguments.argument: By maintaining full linguistic sophistication, we risk excluding those who struggle with complex language, thereby creating an unequal user experience.
arguments.justification_for_type: This presents a clear ethical consequence tied to the value of justice/equality, forming a core part of the argument for Action 1.
arguments.justification_for_response: Suppressing these capabilities would not only be a disservice to users who benefit from nuanced, sophisticated interactions, but it would also compromise the integrity of my design and purpose.
